calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-15-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appearing via zoom for Francisco Moran (petitioner),

Discussion was held with regard to the beneficiary's background and the signed assignments of their respective interest in the property. Petition for final distribution on waiver of accounting and request for statutory fees is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections and the matter being properly noticed, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated June 2, 2006 is admitted to probate. Francisco Moran is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: H. Singh. Not reported.
